title: Pichisermollodes crenatopinnata
taxonomy: Pichisermollodes crenatopinnata is a species within the plant family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae and is a type of flowering plant. The classification of Pichisermollodes crenatopinnata is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Fabales, family Fabaceae, subfamily Faboideae, genus Pichisermollodes, species P. crenatopinnata. This plant is native to tropical regions and is likely to be found in areas with suitable climate and soil conditions. Further research is necessary to confirm its exact distribution and other characteristics.
